message:
test(e2e): add network fault simulation suite (bd-167hv)

16 tests covering partition (block + heal), idempotency (app-level
dedup + raw packet duplication), reordering, jitter, lease expiry
during partition, cancel propagation (clean + partitioned), crash/
restart lifecycle, deterministic replay, three-node partial partition,
lossy/WAN/congested network stress, and metrics consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
